text: Welcome, mentor_lina! We’re excited to have you as a mentor. Please review the mentor handbook in #mentors and feel free to introduce yourself in #introductions.
Welcome, newbie_kim! 🎉 You’ve been approved as a member. Say hi in #introductions and check out the community guidelines in #rules to get started.
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! As an event helper, you can start by checking the upcoming events calendar in #events and reading the event helper checklist.
Welcome to the community, helper_alex! Thanks for stepping up as a moderator—please review the mod guidelines in #mod-info.
